titleStmt.title: SII 23.350: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 350. (A.R. No. 350 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 4: 1016-17 A.D.

summary.p: This is built in at the end of the lines. It seems to register a grant of one vēli and 4 mā of land at Rājakēsari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Nallūr-nāḍu a division of Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu, and a house (or site) at Vēmbaṟṟūr alias Śōḻamārttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to an Ambaṭṭa resident of the latter place by name Araiyaṉ Uttamaśōḻaṉ alias Rājēndraśōḻa-Prayōgadaraiyaṉ as Śalyakriyābhōga (surgery-grant?), by Āḻvār Śrī Parāntakaṉ Kundavaippirāṭṭiyār (the paternal aunt of the king and elder sister of Rājarāja I), while she was staying in the palace at Paḻaiyāṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmarāṉa śrīrājentracoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu nāṉkāvatu Āḻvār śrī pirāntakaṉ kuntavaippirāṭṭiyār paḻai yāṟu koyilil māḷikaiyil Āti pūmiyil Eḻuntaruḷiiruntu nitta vinotavaḷanāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭu brahmateyam Irājakesaricatu rvetimaṅkalattu śalyakrayā bhokamāka vaikka rājendracoḻaṉuk
māvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe nāṉkumāvum Irājendraciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu brahmadeyam vempaṟṟūrākiya śrī coḻamāttāṇṭac caturvetimaṅkalattu Ambhaṭṭaṉ Araiyaṉ Uttamacoḻaṉāṉa Irājentracoḻaprayogataraiyaṉṉukku Ivaṉ vargattārkku Ivūr śalyakra
vempaṟṟūrāṉa śrī coḻamāttāṇṭac caturvetimaṅkalattu śalyakrayā bhogattukku [rāje]ntracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu nāṉkāvatu koṇṭa maṉaiāvatu Ivūr śrī Arumoḻitevacceri Ātaṉūr śi vairāccaṉ tāyaṉakkapirāṉpaṭṭa comayājiyār pakkal
Digital edition of SII 23.350 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
